# Vendored UI libraries

Imported third-party sources (not modified unless noted):

| Package | Source | License |
|---------|--------|---------|
| Fusion | https://github.com/dphfox/Fusion | MIT |
| OnyxUI | https://github.com/loneka/onyx-ui | MIT |
| ColorUtils | https://github.com/csqrl/Colour-Utils | MIT |
| spr | https://github.com/Fraktality/spr | MIT |
| vide | https://github.com/centau/vide | MIT |
| Plasma | https://github.com/evaera/Plasma | MIT |
| Iris | https://github.com/SirMallard/Iris | LGPL-3.0 |

Docs: https://elttob.uk/Fusion/0.3/ · https://loneka.com/onyx-ui/
